tests.name: Concurrency operations > concurrent-clicks-100: 100 parallel clicks are all counted
Concurrency operations > concurrent-clicks-500: 500 parallel clicks are all counted
Concurrency operations > concurrent-creates-same-code: 10 parallel creates with same custom_code yield exactly 1 success
Concurrency operations > concurrent-creates-same-url: 20 parallel creates with same URL all return same code
Concurrency operations > hash-uniqueness-50: 50 different URLs generate 50 unique codes
Concurrency operations > concurrent-redirects-burst: 200 parallel redirects to same URL all return 301 correctly
CRUD operations > create-basic: POST /urls creates a short URL with correct response shape
CRUD operations > create-with-custom-code: POST /urls with custom_code sets the code
CRUD operations > create-with-expiration: POST /urls with expires_at in future sets expiration
CRUD operations > create-invalid-url: POST /urls with invalid URL returns 400
CRUD operations > create-duplicate-custom-code: POST /urls with duplicate custom_code returns 409
CRUD operations > create-expired-date: POST /urls with expires_at in past returns 400
CRUD operations > get-existing: GET /urls/:id returns the created URL
CRUD operations > get-nonexistent: GET /urls/:id with unknown ID returns 404
CRUD operations > update-url: PATCH /urls/:id updates the url field
CRUD operations > update-expiration: PATCH /urls/:id updates expires_at
CRUD operations > delete-existing: DELETE /urls/:id returns 204 and subsequent GET returns 404
CRUD operations > delete-nonexistent: DELETE /urls/:id with unknown ID returns 404
CRUD operations > idempotent-create: POST /urls with same URL twice returns same code with 200
CRUD operations > idempotent-create-with-custom-code: POST same URL with custom_code on second call is ignored, returns existing
Pagination operations > pagination-default: GET /urls returns 10 items with meta.total=15
Pagination operations > pagination-page-2: GET /urls?page=2 returns remaining 5 items
Pagination operations > pagination-custom-per-page: GET /urls?per_page=5 returns 5 items
Pagination operations > pagination-order-desc: first item in list has the most recent created_at
QR Code operations > qr-code-basic: GET /urls/:id/qr returns base64 PNG QR code
QR Code operations > qr-code-not-found: GET /urls/:id/qr with unknown ID returns 404
QR Code operations > qr-code-different-urls: different URLs generate different QR codes
QR Code operations > qr-code-content-type: GET /urls/:id/qr returns application/json
Redirect operations > redirect-basic: GET /:code returns 301 with Location header pointing to original URL
Redirect operations > redirect-increments-clicks: GET /:code three times increments click_count to 3
Redirect operations > redirect-not-found: GET /:code with nonexistent code returns 404
Redirect operations > redirect-expired: GET /:code for expired URL returns 410
Stats operations > stats-with-clicks: GET /urls/:id/stats returns click_count, clicks_per_day and clicks_per_hour after clicks
Stats operations > stats-no-clicks: GET /urls/:id/stats returns click_count=0 with empty arrays
Stats operations > stats-not-found: GET /urls/:id/stats with unknown ID returns 404
Validation operations > code-format: auto-generated code is at least 6 alphanumeric characters
Validation operations > custom-code-too-long: POST /urls with custom_code exceeding 16 chars returns 400
Validation operations > url-very-long: POST /urls with a valid 2000-char URL returns 201
Validation operations > content-type-json: POST /urls response has Content-Type application/json
